headline: Why United Parcel Service (UPS) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of parcel delivery company UPS (NYSE:UPS) jumped 2.6% in the afternoon session after ship-tracking services reported the first vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire.

raw.headline: Why United Parcel Service (UPS) Stock Is Up Today
raw.summary: Shares of parcel delivery company UPS (NYSE:UPS) jumped 2.6% in the afternoon session after ship-tracking services reported the first vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Markets love a ceasefire — but can it last?
summary: The Iran-U.S. ceasefire has lifted markets, but some cracks are already showing in the 'fragile truce.'

headline: Supply Chain Stocks Soar on Ceasefire News
summary: Shares of logistics, freight, trucking, shipping and supply chain technology showed gains of between 2 and 5 percent.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading higher amid overall market strength and easing energy costs due to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.

headline: New Ownership of Pak Mail in Grand Rapids, Michigan Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for More Than 30 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in Grand Rapids, MI to new owners, Ellen Washington and Patricia Ouellette. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail for more than 30 years.
